title: RTPworld
description: this plugin add the /rtp fonctionnality to be teleported to the nether or oveworld or end
body:
# 📦 RTPGUI — Random Teleportation with Graphical Interface

This plugin adds an intuitive interface for randomly teleporting to the Overworld, Nether, or End.  
No more complicated commands — just type `/rtp` and choose your dimension from a chest-style menu!

---

## ✨ Features
- Stylish GUI interface with green-tinted glass panes  
- Choose between Overworld, Nether, and End via clickable blocks  
- Safe teleportation (avoids water, lava, void, etc.)  
- Configurable cooldown via `config.yml`  
- Customizable teleport radius per world  
- Visual and sound effects upon arrival  

---

## 🔧 Configuration
```yaml
cooldown-seconds: 240
rtp-radius-overworld: 1000
rtp-radius-nether: 300
rtp-radius-end: 200

Developed by 2onepunchman2 💚
